message:
fix: health --json now reports real DB stats; expand skips non-message records

- health --json was calling state_meta_json with allow_db_open=false,
  always reporting 0 conversations/messages
- expand was rendering queue-operation records as blank "unknown" entries

Closes #102

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
